About Us

Global FX Option is a U.S. based investment situated in New York. We are dynamic group whose main focus is to provide our clients with the best possible service, We apply a systematic and quantitative approach to investment management, with the aim of generating high-quality and diversifying alpha for its client’s portfolio.

The company offers long term and short term investment, Global FX Option was established in 2010 and it initially began trading stocks, shares and bonds it got involved in forex trading 2012 and was among the pioneer traders of crypto-currencies in the advent of bitcoin 2019

Read More

Why chose us

Highly Secured
HIGH ROI
GUARANTEED RETURNS
24/7 Live Support

Our Services

Cryptocurrencies

Cryptocurrencies are sets of software protocols for generating digital tokens and for tracking transactions in a way that makes it hard to counterfeit or re-use tokens.

Read More

Escrow Service

Escrow comes into play when two parties are in the process of completing a transaction and there is uncertainty over whether one party or another will...

Read More

Loans

Getting a loan doesn't have to be
intimidating, with the right lender it can be a simple process. You only need a lender committed to ...

Read More

Real Estate

Real estate trading is the wild side of real estate investment. Like day traders, who are distinct from buy-and-hold investors, real estate traders are an entirely different breed from buy-and-rent landlords.

Readmore

Forex

Forex or FX is an acronym of Foreign Exchange and Forex trading means to trade on this market. Trading takes place by predicting how one currency performs against another one

Read More

Non Farm Payroll [NFP]

The non-farm payroll report causes one of the consistently largest rate movements of any news announcement in the forex market. As a result, many analysts,

- Marlum Kayum Developer of Buspro

Answer & Questions

How long does it take for my deposit to be credited into my account?

As soon as deposit is received. Typically takes 1-2 hour(s)

How long does the withdrawal process take?

Usually just a few hours though there might be delays from financial houses, we try our best to ensure withdrawals are speedily disbursed

What is the possibility that I will

There is always risk of losing funds but we ensure that all invested funds are capital insured implying that should trading go south that the amount invested at the time of trading is covered by Insurance also we also have an Employee Negligence cover to the tune of one million dollars

Do you charge fees for services?

No we do not charge for our services as we retain our profits before crediting investors their predetermined profit rate, some investment options may require fees in such cases the investor is advised properly

About

Global FX Option is a U.S.-based Investment company. We are a dynamic group whose main focus is to provide our clients with the best possible service, We apply a systematic and quantitative approach to investment management, with the aim of generating high-quality and diversifying alpha for its clients’ portfolios.
